labor_share.basis: QCEW 2024 private total annual wages at 621610 ($71,424,773,339) x benefits multiplier 1.4294 [ECEC private-industry total comp $46.60/hr / wages $32.60/hr = 1.4294 (March 2026 reference period)] / SUSB 2022 receipts at 621610 ($113,350,417,000). Vintage mismatch: 2024 wages over 2022 receipts, stated. Level: 6-digit. Harmonized to IPS basis ÷1.3407 (median of 65 dual-method codes).

n_band.basis: margin 0.1580 (margins.json[62]: Damodaran Jan 2026: Hospitals/Healthcare Facilities EBITDA/Sales 15.80% (closest named bucket for provider economics; public support-services bucket at 3.87% reflects a different business model)); revenue/employee $72,294 (SUSB 2022 receipts/employment at 621610); class <5: 11,187 firms, avg revenue/firm $242,470 (class receipts/firms), implied EBITDA $38,310 -> out of $1-10M band; class 5-9: 3,386 firms, avg revenue/firm $660,235 (class receipts/firms), implied EBITDA $104,317 -> out of $1-10M band; class 10-19: 3,828 firms, avg revenue/firm $1,118,957 (class receipts/firms), implied EBITDA $176,795 -> out of $1-10M band; class 20-99: 7,049 firms, avg revenue/firm $2,771,668 (class receipts/firms), implied EBITDA $437,923 -> out of $1-10M band; class 100-499: 1,983 firms, avg revenue/firm $10,545,427 (class receipts/firms), implied EBITDA $1,666,177 -> IN $1-10M band; class 500+: 765 firms, avg revenue/firm $83,228,652 (class receipts/firms), implied EBITDA $13,150,127 -> out of $1-10M band; n_band = 1,983
